description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow with read-only repository permissions that runs daily at 3:23 AM UTC. The workflow should have two jobs, clang-tidy and valgrind, both running on ubuntu-22.04. The clang-tidy job checks out the repository, sets up a build agent for clang-tidy, configures the build with clang, and runs clang-tidy. The valgrind job checks out the repository, sets up a build agent for valgrind-full, and runs valgrind checks with gcc and make.
